name: Lutterworth

locations.address:
The Pavilion, The Rec, Coventry Road, Lutterworth
OR Market Harborough Police Station, Fairfield Road.

description: This neighbourhood beat covers Lutterworth town and the villages of Bitteswell, Ullesthorpe, the Claybrookes, Cotesbach, Swinford, Catthorpe, the Kilworths, Husbands Bosworth, Mowsley, Shawell and Knaptoft.
